title: asphodelus ramosus subsp. albus
intro: Asphodelus ramosus subsp. albus is a lesser-known subspecies of the asphodelus ramosus plant, which is a type of asphodel, a genus of flowering plants that belongs to the lily family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with asphodelus ramosus subsp. albus include its potential to help with digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots and leaves are often dried and used in traditional remedies.
